commentary: Chronic Pain Program is not doing less forever. It is finding the baseline honestly enough that more becomes possible later. That distinction matters in rehabilitation.
Hand therapy continuing education is back on my desk this season. Anatomy, splinting, and the useful humility of reviewing fundamentals.
Good supervision keeps the question open long enough for reasoning to show up. I am trying to get better at that part.
Studying with other rehab professionals is a useful reminder that professional reasoning is built in layers. None of the good layers are rushed.
